Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY

BSCI329 Instructional Assistance Practicum (1-3 Credits) Students serve as instructional assistants in selected undergraduate biology courses. Roles and responsibilities are determined on a course- speciﬁc basis and approved by the College Undergraduate Program Committee. Prerequisite: Permission of CMNS-Biological Sciences UG Program. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs. Additional Information: Course not acceptable toward major requirements in the Biological Sciences.

BSCI330 Cell Biology and Physiology (4 Credits) Biochemical and physiological mechanisms underlying cellular function. Properties of cells which make life possible and mechanisms by which cells provide energy, reproduce, and regulate and integrate with each other and their environment. Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in CHEM131 and CHEM132. And minimum grade of C- in BSCI170 and BSCI171; or minimum grade of C- in BSCI105. Restriction: Must not have completed BSCI230. Credit Only Granted for: BSCI230 or BSCI330. Formerly: BSCI230.
